revision.comment: convert param to lower case before testing
revision.text:
| style="width: 30%; text-align: center;" rowspan="{{{rows|1}}}"|{{#if:{{{1|}}}|{{#switch:{{lc:{{{1}}}}} |#default={{#if:{{{1}}}|'''Vacant'''}} |ab='''In abeyance''' |co='''In commission''' |di='''Disclaimed''' |do='''Dormant''' |re='''Recreated''' |su='''Suspended''' |sede='''''[[Sede vacante]]''''' |unkn='''Unknown''' |abeyance='''In abeyance''' |commission='''In commission''' |disclaimed='''Disclaimed''' |dormant='''Dormant''' |extinct='''Extinct''' |forfeit='''Forfeit''' |recreated='''Recreated''' |suspended='''Suspended''' |sedevacante='''''[[Sede vacante]]''''' |unknown='''Unknown''' }}|'''Vacant'''}}{{#if:{{{reason|}}}|
{{{reason}}}
}}{{#if:{{{last|}}}|

'''{{{unknlast}}} '''}}{{#if:{{{unknnext|}}}|
Next known title holder:
'''{{{unknnext}}} '''}}{{#if:{{{as|}}}|
'''''as {{{as}}} '''''}} {{Documentation}}

revision.comment: 1 revision imported: mass importing wikipedia templates

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
revision.text:

revision.comment: Text replacement - "{{Documentation}}" to "{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]"
revision.text:

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23575804085|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
| style="width: 30%; text-align: center;" rowspan="{{{rows|1}}}"|{{#if:{{{1|}}}|{{#switch:{{lc:{{{1}}}}} |#default={{#if:{{{1}}}|'''Vacant'''}} |ab='''In abeyance''' |co='''In commission''' |di='''Disclaimed''' |do='''Dormant''' |re='''Recreated''' |su='''Suspended''' |sede='''''[[Sede vacante]]''''' |unkn='''Unknown''' |abeyance='''In abeyance''' |commission='''In commission''' |disclaimed='''Disclaimed''' |dormant='''Dormant''' |extinct='''Extinct''' |forfeit='''Forfeit''' |recreated='''Recreated''' |suspended='''Suspended''' |sedevacante='''''[[Sede vacante]]''''' |unknown='''Unknown''' }}|'''Vacant'''}}{{#if:{{{reason|}}}|
